title: phleum pratense var. fallax
intro: Phleum pratense var. fallax, also known as fall creeping timothy, is a rare variant of the common timothy grass (Phleum pratense), a perennial grass native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phleum pratense var. fallax include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, such as bloating and abdominal pain, as well as its possible anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. Herbal preparations of Phleum pratense var. fallax include teas and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the dried grass in hot water or extracting its active compounds with a solvent.
